posts.title: Welcome to Trust Hijacking Exposed
posts.author: Miriam Roth Mandel
posts.excerpt: This site documents a Pennsylvania family's fight for justice after a stranger walked into Orphans' Court and walked out with control of their family trust.

posts.title: How to Hijack a Trust in Pennsylvania
posts.author: Miriam Roth Mandel
posts.excerpt: The disturbingly simple process that allows strangers to seize control of family trusts through Orphans' Court—with no notice to all beneficiaries.

posts.title: Ten Heirs, One Notice
posts.author: Miriam Roth Mandel
posts.excerpt: How nine trust beneficiaries were kept in the dark while a stranger took control of their family's assets—with the court's blessing.

posts.title: Three Courts, Three Years: Supreme Court Decision Pending
posts.author: Miriam Roth Mandel
posts.excerpt: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court is considering whether to grant allowance of appeal in a case that will determine whether court orders issued without jurisdiction are void.
